title: OptiServer
description: OptiServer is an optimization modpack made for servers mainly
body:
OptiServer utilizes the most- and less-common optimization mods, and if you use this modpack on your server, you can experience much more performance, and more free resources. This modpack is for fabric, but I included [Cardboard](https://modrinth.com/mod/cardboard) in it, so you can use most [Bukkit]([https://dev.bukkit.org/](https://dev.bukkit.org/))/[Spigot](https://spigotmc.org/)/[Paper](https://papermc.io/) plugins, for those who want to use them.

This modpack optimizes the game in:
- Chunk load
- Bugs
- Drops
- Mob despawn rules
- Light engine
- Memory
- Nether Portal
- Player
- Inactivity

If you don't want any of these, feel free to modify the modpack.
